case_title: ABRAHAM BATTAT VS. SAFEWAY STORES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BATTAT, ABRAHAM AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY STORES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED JUL-01-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY STORES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2013 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-12-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE, IF NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT 8/6/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
